steps.title: Follow the however shift
steps.content: The first two sentences contrast private libraries with public ones. The final sentence, introduced by "however," says the traditions were not as distinct as they seem because both reflected personal patronage.

steps.title: Choose the shared feature
steps.content: Choice A questions whether private libraries disappeared, which the passage does not discuss. Choice B adds criticism of imperial leaders. Choice C misstates the period and focus. The remaining choice captures the essential similarity. The answer is D.
